name: anyharness
description: Skill-first adaptive engineering harness for Codex. Discover project domains, synthesize harness profiles, create expert review roles, and generate review packets.

interface.longDescription: Use AnyHarness to learn the current repository, ask domain-specific questions, synthesize a project harness profile, generate expert review roles, and create review packets for cross-model review.
defaultPrompt: Use AnyHarness to initialize {{repo_name}} as a new project.
Use AnyHarness to review the current diff in {{repo_name}}.
Use AnyHarness to create a cross-model review packet for {{repo_name}}.
Use AnyHarness to update {{repo_name}}'s harness after a major architecture change.

tools.name: anyharness_scan_project
tools.description: Scan a repository for stacks, AI workflow files, and domain signals. Read-only; safe to retry. Outputs JSON: sampleFiles, stacks, domainSignals, aiWorkflow, notable, truncated, scanScope.

path.description: Repository root to scan. Default: current directory.

tools.name: anyharness_collect_diff
tools.description: Collect the current git diff. Outputs JSON: mode, changedFiles, diff, empty. Returns {error, empty:true} on stdout when not in a git repo.

mode.description: Which diff to collect. Default: both.

tools.name: anyharness_write_profile
tools.description: Write or draft the project harness profile. Without confirm=true: drafts to .anyharness/drafts/profile.json (safe default). With confirm=true: writes .anyharness/profile.json. Requires overwrite=true if profile.json already exists.

from_path.description: Optional path to an existing JSON file to use as the seed profile.

confirm.description: Set true to write .anyharness/profile.json. Default: false (draft only).

overwrite.description: Required when confirm=true and profile.json already exists.

tools.name: anyharness_write_native_prompts
tools.description: Write or draft native AI prompt files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Cursor rule). Safe by default: creates a draft if the target file already exists instead of overwriting.

target.description: Which surfaces to write. Default: both (CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md).

profile_path.description: Optional path to profile.json to embed confirmedDomains and invariants in the output.

tools.name: anyharness_validate_profile
tools.description: Validate a project harness profile JSON against the required schema. Outputs JSON: valid, errors[], nextAction. Exits 1 on failure.

tools.name: anyharness_generate_review_packet
tools.description: Generate a self-contained cross-model review packet under .anyharness/packets/. Reads profile.json for real gates and invariants. Exits 1 with JSON error if diff is empty. Truncates diff if it exceeds max_diff_kb.

role.description: Expert review role name. Default: code-reviewer.

mode.description: Which diff to include. Default: both.

max_diff_kb.description: Maximum diff size in KB before truncation. Default: 500.

tools.name: anyharness_install_local_hooks
tools.description: Install local enforcement hooks and CI workflow. WITHOUT confirm=true: dry-run only — lists what would be created, writes nothing. WITH confirm=true: writes .anyharness/scripts/check.mjs, .githooks/pre-commit, .githooks/commit-msg, .github/workflows/anyharness.yml and sets git core.hooksPath.

confirm.description: Set true to actually install hooks. Default: false (dry-run, safe).

tools.name: anyharness_propose_evolution
tools.description: Apply learning candidates from a review to the project harness profile. Reads a findings JSON ({trigger, candidates[]}) and the current .anyharness/profile.json. WITHOUT confirm=true: drafts the merged profile at .anyharness/drafts/profile.evolved.json with a diff report (safe default). WITH confirm=true: merges new invariants/gates/unknowns into .anyharness/profile.json and appends a timestamped entry to learningHistory. Idempotent: re-running with the same findings is a no-op.

findings.description: Path to a JSON file with shape {trigger: string, candidates: [...]}. See references/harness-evolution.md for the candidate schema.

confirm.description: Set true to merge into .anyharness/profile.json and append learningHistory. Default: false (draft only).
